prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the Regulatory Framework for Social Housing in England, specifically related to local councils and landlords in England such as the North East Derbyshire District Council. It does not apply to Scotland, which has its own housing regulations and governing bodies.
